notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler grounds into a double play, third baseman Graham Pauley to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Colt Keith out at 2nd. Dillon Dingler out at 1st.
